title: Vanilla NameTags CIT Pack
description: This changes the texture for the name tags with special easter eggs!
body:
## This pack changes the Textures of Nametags of EasterEggs to match their Theme!!
**NO OPTIFINE REQUIRED! Just Vanilla 1.21.5**

![InGame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/097ee666bb07f239f5662ffdb7990fc38dd98df4.png)

![In Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38aaec99ce051afe60ddd00d0d989451fa769bde.png)

**How to install:**
- Go to the escape menu and press "Options"
- Then press "Resource Packs"
- In here, press "Open Pack Folder" This should open a folder.
- Drag and drop the resource pack in that folder
- The resource pack should now be available in the menu
